features: 24 HOUR PROTECTION: Our deodorant glides smoothly, offering an even and lasting protection of up to 24hrs
SODA-FREE FORMULATION: Its unique baking soda-free formulation ensures it stays effective and free from irritation throughout your busy day, from morning workouts to evening engagements
NATURAL: This natural balmy corn starch-based deodorant ensures a smooth application without piling or stickiness, ensuring light and comfortable wear.
FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: The upcycled prickly pair is a great for soothing any potential irritation, which makes it suitable for sensitive skin.

ENRICHING INGREDIENTS: Enriched with macadamia oil, it nourishes and hydrates, ensuring your skin feels soft and cared for all day long. The refreshingly zesty scent of bergamot and lime provides a light, uplifting fragrance that keeps you feeling fresh and confident
description: Product Description Natural deodorant for sensitive skin, soda-free formulation. Enriched with macadamia oil, it nourishes and hydrates, ensuring your skin feels soft and cared for all day long. The refreshingly zesty scent of bergamot and lime provides a light, uplifting fragrance that keeps you feeling fresh and confident Directions Clean and dry underarm area before application. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the underarm area. Allow the deodorant to fully dry before putting on clothing. Reapply as needed throughout the day or after physical activity for continuous protection. Safety Warning For external use only. See more
